title: interfaces.json
description: Declares the typed contracts between modules. Locked at end of Phase 1.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this interface contract.

owner_module.description: The module id that owns and exports this interface.

consumers.description: Module ids that consume this interface. The orchestrator uses this to populate UPSTREAM_ARTIFACTS for each consumer's prompt.

language.description: Language of the typed contract. Determines how the orchestrator's downstream artifact (under .mission/artifacts/) is formatted.

contract.description: The typed contract itself, embedded as a string. For Go that means an interface declaration; for OpenAPI, a YAML snippet; etc. Long contracts may also live in .mission/artifacts/<id>-contract.<ext> and this field becomes the inline excerpt.

notes.description: Optional prose elaboration (preconditions, postconditions, error semantics).
